author: priya.sharma
message: chore(cache): adjust default entry ttl in shared cache config
diff:
@@ pkg/cache/config.go @@
 func DefaultConfig() *Config {
 	return &Config{
-		// DefaultTTL is the entry lifetime shared by all services that
-		// embed the read-through cache and do not set their own TTL.
-		DefaultTTL: 15 * time.Minute,
+		// DefaultTTL is the entry lifetime shared by all services that
+		// embed the read-through cache and do not set their own TTL.
+		DefaultTTL: 15 * time.Second,
 		MaxEntries: 100000,
 	}
 }
@@ pkg/cache/redis.yaml @@
-  default_ttl: 15m
+  default_ttl: 15s
   max_entries: 100000

author: deepak.rao
message: perf: reuse sync.Pool for buffers in encoder
diff:
@@ pkg/codec/pool.go @@
+var bufPool = sync.Pool{New: func() any { return new(bytes.Buffer) }}
 	b := bufPool.Get().(*bytes.Buffer)
+	defer bufPool.Put(b)

author: carlos.mendez
message: refactor(catalog): simplify item lookup handler
diff:
@@ services/catalog/lookup.go @@
-	item, err := s.cache.GetOrLoad(ctx, key, s.loadFromDB)
-	if err != nil { return nil, err }
-	return item, nil
+	return s.cache.GetOrLoad(ctx, key, s.loadFromDB)
